entry.title: HWO SIG Seminar, 12 August 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: Habitable Worlds Observatory SIG Seminar. Details TBA

entry.title: Community Science (Ad ASTRA) Workshop, Sept 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: 1-3 September 2026. The Community Science (Ad ASTRA) Workshop is organized by the NASA Astrophysics Division to engage the community in defining future large, strategic astrophysics missions.

entry.title: XR SIG Seminar, 24 July 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: Hybrid CMOS Detectors for Future X-ray Missions. Speaker: Abraham D. Falcone, Penn State University. 1:00pm – 2:00pm ET

entry.title: XR SIG Seminar, 7 August 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: A TDAMM Mission Concept Offered by the X-ray Timing Science Analysis Group: the Dynamic Extreme Universe in X-rays (DEUS-X) Machine

entry.title: Habitable Worlds Observatory SIG Seminar, 12 Aug 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: Habitable Worlds Observatory SIG Seminar. Details TBA

entry.title: Community Science (Ad ASTRA) Workshop, Sept 2026 - NASA Science
entry.summary: 1-3 September 2026. The Community Science (Ad ASTRA) Workshop is organized by the NASA Astrophysics Division.

entry.title: Hubble Spies One-Sided Spiral - NASA Science
entry.summary: This Hubble image features the spiral galaxy NGC 4654, located 72 million light-years away in the constellation Virgo (the Maiden).

entry.title: A Million-Panel Project - NASA Science
entry.summary: Utah’s new solar power and battery storage facility is among the largest in the region.

entry.title: Curiosity Blog, Sols 4954–4960: Celebrating Our Rover Engineers Past and Present - NASA Science
entry.summary: Written by Lucy Thompson, Senior Research Scientist, University of New Brunswick, Canada

entry.title: ISS Results: Materials Science - NASA
entry.summary: On episode 430, Kim de Groh and Sylvie Crowell review what researchers have learned and published from the Materials International Space Station Experiment (MISSE) platform that tests how materials perform in the harsh environment of space.
